calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 606
MINI MINUTES: Apperances:
Larisa K. Raymundo, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant Progressive Direct Insurance Company
Jennifer Rosenthal & Andrew Rosenthal, Plaintiffs/Respondents

Parties present their respective cases by testimony under oath.
The Court hears oral arguments regarding the proper venue for the case and whether the dismissal of defendant Thomas Harold Purdom was proper. The Court encourages the parties to discuss settlement. The parties are ordered to give a status report by June 12, 2017.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk C. Banayad, not reported
